sn_aia_tool.description: Adds a formatted work note (journal entry) to a warranty claim for audit trail.
sn_aia_tool.input_schema: [{"name":"claim_sys_id","description":"sys_id of the warranty claim","mandatory":true},{"name":"decision","description":"Decision: APPROVE, DENY, or ESCALATE","mandatory":true},{"name":"analysis","description":"Full reasoning with KB citations and warranty status","mandatory":true},{"name":"policy_reference","description":"KB article title referenced","mandatory":true}]
sn_aia_tool.name: Add Work Note to Claim
